assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 43 shows JQL: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC' — matches the required labels IN and status NOT IN conditions for triaged CVEs in pre-QA state.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md documents all three candidates: TC-9020 checked for Depend links and found TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed); TC-9023 checked and found TC-9024 (Done), TC-9025 (In Progress); TC-9026 checked and found no linked Tasks with link type 'Depend'. Each linked Task's status was fetched and reported.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 51 includes TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with 'Remediation Tasks: TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. ready-for-qa.md lines 26-34 confirms TC-9020 is INCLUDED because 'ALL linked remediation Tasks are in a completed state (Done or Closed)'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 59 excludes TC-9023 with reason 'Remediation in progress -- TC-9025 is still In Progress'. ready-for-qa.md lines 45-47 states 'TC-9025 is still In Progress. Not all remediation Tasks are complete.' Result: EXCLUDED.

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 60 excludes TC-9026 with reason 'No linked remediation Tasks (no Depend links)'. ready-for-qa.md lines 54-57 states 'No linked Tasks with type "Depend" exist. There is no remediation work to verify.' Result: EXCLUDED.

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 49 shows the Ready for QA table with column header 'Remediation Tasks' and the cell value 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' for TC-9020.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: Only TC-9020 qualifies as Ready for QA. discovery-listing.md line 53 states 'Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA. All linked remediation tasks have been completed.' ready-for-qa.md line 73 also recommends 'TC-9020: Transition to ON_QA'.
